remember: Students will be able to recall the definitions and concepts related to human settlements.
Students will be able to identify the types of human settlements and their characteristics.
understand: Students will be able to explain the factors influencing the distribution and density of human settlements.
Students will be able to describe the role of site and situation in the development of human settlements.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of human settlements to real-world scenarios and case studies.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of urbanization on human settlements.
analyze: Students will be able to compare and contrast the characteristics of rural and urban settlements.
Students will be able to evaluate the problems and challenges faced by human settlements.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the concept of human settlements and its importance.
To analyze the factors that influence the distribution of human settlements.
To identify the characteristics of rural and urban settlements.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the ability to define and explain key terms related to human settlements.
CBSE evaluates the understanding of the factors influencing human settlement patterns.
CBSE assesses the ability to analyze and compare rural and urban settlements.
